title: ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cephalonica
intro: Ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cephalonica, also known as Ceph. Spider Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Greek medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cephalonica include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations often involve the use of the plant's roots and flowers, which can be consumed as a decoction or used topically to treat various health conditions.
